boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

register.name: Name

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

errors.privacyRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email, we sent a link to reset your password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Confirming your email address…
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email is confirmed. You're all set.
verifyEmail.invalidMessage: This verification link is invalid or has expired. You can request a new one from your profile.
verifyEmail.subscribeGateMessage: We've sent a new verification link to your email. Confirm your email address to unlock subscriptions.
verifyEmail.bannerMessage: Your email isn't verified yet. Verify it to secure your account.
verifyEmail.resendSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Could not resend the verification email.

enterStory.title: Enter a story
enterStory.description: Read the briefing and choose where to start.

talkToCharacters.title: Talk to characters
talkToCharacters.description: Type or speak your questions freely.

findTheEnd.title: Find the ending
findTheEnd.description: Use the clues to reach your conclusion.

history.title: My investigations
history.subtitle: Pick up where you left off.
history.empty: You haven't started any investigations yet.
history.continueTitle: Pick up where you left off

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Get monthly credits and keep investigating.
subscription.unavailable: Subscriptions are not available right now.
subscription.refreshMonthly: Credits refresh every cycle — unused ones don't roll over
subscription.cancelAnytime: Cancel anytime from the customer portal
subscription.activeWillEnd: Active (will be cancelled at the end of the period)
subscription.checkoutSuccess: Subscription activated! Your credits were added.
subscription.cpfModalDescription: You need to provide your CPF to proceed with checkout.

errors.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
errors.portalFailed: Failed to open the customer portal.
errors.noActiveSubscription: You don't have an active subscription.

stories.title: Stories
stories.startError: Could not start the session. Please try again.
stories.premiumRequiredMessage: This is a premium story. You need an active subscription to play it.
stories.activeSessionDisclaimer: You already have an ongoing investigation for this story. Pick up where you left off.
stories.abandonDescription: This action is irreversible. You will no longer be able to progress in this session. If you want to play again, you'll start from scratch.
stories.abandonedFeedback: Investigation abandoned. You can start a new one below.

play.leadsSubtitle: Examine the scene, question everyone, follow the evidence.
play.cluesHere: {count, plural, =0 {No clues yet} one {# clue found} other {# clues found}}
play.evidenceEmpty: No evidence collected yet. Start investigating to uncover clues.
play.solveLocked: {found}/{total} required clues discovered. Find the remaining required clues to solve the case.

panel.noObjectsHere: There is nothing else to inspect here.
panel.audioEmpty: Could not understand the audio. Try again.
panel.audioError: Failed to process audio. Try again.

errors.required: Current and new passwords are required

cookieConsent.description: We use cookies that are essential to the site and your experience. You may accept or reject optional cookies at any time. <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
